creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Olli Hauer from comment #10)
> Created attachment 146275 [details]
> update to 3.3.13 plus rework
> 
> The patch adopts the update to 3.3.12
> 
> Additional:
>  - heavy lifted Makefile (where possible)
>  - add hints with url's to bugs into Makefile
>  - fix pkg-plist
>  - remove FS_COSS from OPTIONS_DEFINE
>  - patches to not install *.conf$ files (remove install instructions from
> Makefile.in)
> 
> PS:
> I've tried OPTIONS_EXCLUDE for ECAP, but OPSYS is unknown before
> bsd.port.options.mk and after the include this instruction is useless, so
> pick up the BROKEN message.
> 
> Please cross test on FreeBSD 10+ and current

There is no part for files/patch-configure?
